title: PrettyMarker
description: This mod adds the ability to create markers in the world with customizable icons, name colors, and display settings.
body:
# PrettyMarker
This mod adds the ability to create markers in the world with customizable icons, name colors, and display settings.

# Features
- Create markers
- Set icon to markers
- Edit exist markers
- Share your markers using [server plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/prettymarker-paper)
- Customize display on menu

## Marker example
![Marker example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b35e440783603572a287cd3e5a7f0262fda82bcd.png)

## Marker tooltip
